tester.role: automated fontTools inspection with human result review

steps: Download the exact TTF from the pinned Google Fonts source commit.
Inspect name, version, OS/2 fsType, fvar axes, cmap, GSUB/GPOS feature tags, and required currency code points.
Compare advance widths of base digits zero through nine.
expected: File parses cleanly and exposes identity, embedding flag, axes, binary coverage, features, currency glyphs, and numeral behaviour.
actual: Parsed as Newsreader version 1.003. fsType was 0. Weight axis was 200–800 and optical-size axis 6–72. Selected Latin and Vietnamese binary checks passed; no Greek or Cyrillic claim was found in the inspected file. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, and JPY were present. Base digits had equal widths; proportional and tabular figure features were present.

artifacts.description: Candidate metadata derived from this inspection

notes: Pass covers binary inspection only. The continuous-reading brief remains a design intent, not proof of deck performance.
followUp: Run dense-prose, optical-size, phone, application, language, and human typography tests.
